2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler2/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden sthf.no'

<a href="/"><img alt="Gå til forsiden sthf.no" src="/495e5c/globalassets/system/logo-sykehusettelemark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a href="/rettigheter/taushetsplikt-og-innsynsrett/">Les mer </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden sthf.no'

<a class="footer__logo-link" href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden sthf.no" class="footer__logo" src="/495d09/globalassets/system/logo-sykehusettelemark-neg.svg"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler2/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden sthf.no'

<a href="/"><img alt="Gå til forsiden sthf.no" src="/495e5c/globalassets/system/logo-sykehusettelemark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

<a class="footer__logo-link" href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden sthf.no" class="footer__logo" src="/495d09/globalassets/system/logo-sykehusettelemark-neg.svg"/> </a>

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler2/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden sthf.no'

<a href="/"><img alt="Gå til forsiden sthf.no" src="/495e5c/globalassets/system/logo-sykehusettelemark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'KLIKK HER FOR Å LOGGE INN I CHECKWARE'

<a href="https://login-sthf.checkwareonline.com/v2/sthf/respondent/backend-commons/login?ReturnTo=https://login-sthf.checkwareonline.com/v2/sthf/respondent/"> <span class="">KLIKK HER FOR Å LOGGE INN
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden sthf.no'

<a class="footer__logo-link" href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden sthf.no" class="footer__logo" src="/495d09/globalassets/system/logo-sykehusettelemark-neg.svg"/> </a>

Start your heading structure with h1

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="_mainmenu__menu-title_0f157fe">BEHANDLINGER</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="expander__title"> <button aria-controls="besokende-til-pasienter" aria-expanded="false" class="expander__button" data-bs-target="#besokende-til-pasienter" data-bs-toggle="collapse">
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler2/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden sthf.no'

<a href="/"><img alt="Gå til forsiden sthf.no" src="/495e5c/globalassets/system/logo-sykehusettelemark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden sthf.no'

<a class="footer__logo-link" href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden sthf.no" class="footer__logo" src="/495d09/globalassets/system/logo-sykehusettelemark-neg.svg"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden sthf.no'

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="_mainmenu__menu-title_0f157fe">BEHANDLINGER</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="expander__title"> <button aria-controls="hva-gjor-vi-pa-sykehuset" aria-expanded="false" class="expander__button" data-bs-target="#hva-gjor-vi-pa-sykehuset" data-bs-toggle="collapse">
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)

List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler2/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden sthf.no'

<a href="/"><img alt="Gå til forsiden sthf.no" src="/495e5c/globalassets/system/logo-sykehusettelemark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (118 characters)

<a href="https://www.helsenorge.no/parorende/">På helsenorge.no kan du lese mer om hva barn trenger, hvor du kan søke hjelp og hvordan du kan snakke med barn og unge</a>
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden sthf.no'

<a class="footer__logo-link" href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden sthf.no" class="footer__logo" src="/495d09/globalassets/system/logo-sykehusettelemark-neg.svg"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="_mainmenu__menu-title_0f157fe">BEHANDLINGER</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="expander__title"><button aria-controls="toc-list" aria-expanded="false" class="expander__button">Innhold på denne siden</button></h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="toc" style="margin-bottom: 48px; width: 616px;"><div class="expander expander--practical expander--toc" data-id="innhold-pa-denne-siden"><h3 class="expander__title"><button aria-controls="
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

MODERATE

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler2/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden sthf.no'

<a href="/"><img alt="Gå til forsiden sthf.no" src="/495e5c/globalassets/system/logo-sykehusettelemark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (113 characters)

<a href="/om-oss/about-sykehuset-telemark-telemark-hospital-trust/">Sykehuset Te​lemark is a versatile acute hospital and offers diagnostics and treatments in most specialist areas​</a>
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden sthf.no'

<a class="footer__logo-link" href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden sthf.no" class="footer__logo" src="/495d09/globalassets/system/logo-sykehusettelemark-neg.svg"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden sthf.no'

<a href="/"><img alt="Gå til forsiden sthf.no" src="/495e5c/globalassets/system/logo-sykehusettelemark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Link text is a URL

Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="_mainmenu__menu-title_0f157fe">BEHANDLINGER</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler2/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden sthf.no'

<a href="/"><img alt="Gå til forsiden sthf.no" src="/495e5c/globalassets/system/logo-sykehusettelemark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden sthf.no'

<a class="footer__logo-link" href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden sthf.no" class="footer__logo" src="/495d09/globalassets/system/logo-sykehusettelemark-neg.svg"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler2/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden sthf.no'

<a href="/"><img alt="Gå til forsiden sthf.no" src="/495e5c/globalassets/system/logo-sykehusettelemark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
